text:
The suspect who died after being shot by an officer Friday morning near Olympic Village Inn has been identified as an employee of Palisades Tahoe.

In a post on Facebook the Placer County Sheriff's Office identified 29-year-old Vinton Miller as the suspect.

They say he was staying in the Tahoe areaon a work visa from Jamaica.

"Our hearts go out to his family and friends during this challenging time," said a Palisades Tahoe spokesperson in a statement.

The Placer County Sheriff's Office is still actively investigating the incident.

FIRST UPDATE

California State Parks has confirmed a fatal shooting at Palisades Tahoe.

At around 10 a.m. on Friday morning a State Park Peace Officer tried to stop a car involved in a carjacking in Tahoe City, according to a press release from California State Parks.

The officer followed the car until it crashed near Olympic Village Inn at Palisades Tahoe.

After the crash a person got out of the car with a knife and an officer involves shooting involving the State Park Peace Officer happened just as California Highway Patrol arrived on scene.

Officers provided medical aid to the suspect, but they died from their injuries.

The Placer County Sheriff's Office is investigating the incident and California State Parks is cooperating with that investigation.

People are asked to avoid the area as the investigation is ongoing.

ORIGINAL ARTICLE

Placer County authorities are reporting an officer involved shooting near the Olympic Village at Palisades.

The Sheriff’s Office says they are assisting California State Parks with investigating the shooting involving, which involved California State Park Officers.

An update from the Sheriff's Office on Facebook says there is no danger to the public and asks people to avoid the area while the investigation continues.

"This morning, the California State Parks responded to an incident in Olympic Valley outside the Olympic Village Event Center. The incident is stable, but there is still a large police presence," said Palisades Tahoe in a statement.

We're sending a crew to the scene right now to get more details.

There was a critical incident that occurred at Olympic Village Inn at Palisades. State Parks was the primary agency for the incident. The incident is stable, but there is still a large police presence. Please stay clear of the area.pic.twitter.com/yA0kxzqzwU

title: Palisades Tahoe Employee Identified as Suspect Shot by Officer Near Olympic Village Inn | News | 2news.com
